compiled_state.title: RED test: p95 benchmark harness measures latency per validator entry point and consumer read
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write `test_benchmark_measures_p95_per_stage` BEFORE implementing the benchmark harness.

Given: preconditions-benchmark.sh not yet implemented
When: test checks for benchmark script existence and invokability
Then: test fails RED (script absent)

## Test Approach
Given: benchmark script absent
When: test attempts to run `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh`
Then: "not found" error → RED failure

## Implementation Notes
Create `tests/perf/test-preconditions-benchmark.sh` that:
1. Verifies `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh` exists and is executable (RED until T8)
2. Runs benchmark with --iterations=5 (fast) and --dry-run
3. Asserts output contains p95 measurements for all 5 validator stages
4. Asserts output contains p95 measurements for all 4 consumer reads
5. Asserts output format matches expected pattern: `STAGE_P95_MS: <stage> <ms>`
6. Does NOT assert specific ms values (environment-dependent), only structural completeness

Update `.test-index`:
`plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh: tests/perf/test-preconditions-benchmark.sh [test_benchmark_measures_p95_per_stage]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/perf/test-preconditions-benchmark.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present
  Verify: grep '\[test_benchmark_measures_p95_per_stage\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test fails RED before T8 implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/perf/test-preconditions-benchmark.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
